messages.content: Please don't click the link - I have been hacked. If you have, I recommend changing your passwords. So sorry!

Hey! can I ask a favor to vote for me? I am applying to be a co-host for a podcast organized by Spotify in collaboration with Google. The maximum number of eligible votes is 450 and every vote counts. Iâve reached 312, just 138 more to reach the milestone. I would really appreciate it if you voted for me. here is the voting link: https://spotifyseries.ct.ws/en
